assertions.reason: No runs were created after launch, so no run detail existed to inspect persona summary fields.
No runs were created after launch, so there was no milestone timeline to inspect.
No runs were created after launch, so no self-report fields were rendered on the real runs surface.
No runs were created after launch, so no artifact links were rendered on the runs surface.
The Outcome filter UI rendered, but with zero runs after launch there was no real outcome subset to validate.
The Persona filter UI rendered, but with zero runs after launch there was no real proto-persona subset to validate.
The URL filter field rendered, but with zero runs after launch there was no real finalUrl data to validate against.
Setting finalUrlContains=guard on the Runs tab persisted in the URL and in the URL contains filter after navigating to Overview and back to Runs.
evidence: Observed URL before and after tab switch: /runs?finalUrlContains=guard; visible URL contains filter value remained “guard”.

blockers: The study launch failed before any runs were created, so run-level inspection and filter behavior could not be exercised on real data.
